sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 1:1
items.html:
(to the question) Odem [redness]
The Odem is the five Gevurot [judgments] in Yesod of Ima. See Answer 55. (p. 787, Item 82)
